items.summary: Remove all occurrences of 'A UNIT OF BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (and its Hindi/Odia equivalents) from every user-facing surface across the application — including the page title in index.html, the Footer's unit designation line, the Header, Hero section, and any other component or translation key that currently displays this sub-branding phrase. The standalone name 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' (or 'Bhagyalaxmi Construction') must still appear wherever the business name is shown.

In the SchemeInfo component's vendor/installer selection step (Phase 2 of the application process), update the text in all three languages (English, Hindi, Odia) so that it explicitly instructs the user to select 'BHAGYALAXMI CONSTRUCTION' as the vendor/empanelled installer. No other vendor names should be mentioned in this step.
